vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value

risk.desc: Potential misalignment due to bolted connection between wing spar and fuselage spine.
risk.mit: Implement precise alignment features and ensure proper torque application.

risk.desc: Risk of improper fit for snap-fit connections at V-Tail interface.
risk.mit: Specify clear tolerances and conduct fit tests during prototyping.

risk.desc: Possibility of insufficient clearance for landing gear mount access cover.
risk.mit: Review clearance dimensions and adjust if necessary to ensure easy access.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress on wing skin due to direct sun exposure.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies such as heat sinks or insulation layers.

risk.desc: Potential for aerodynamic interference from stabilizer and ruddervator.
risk.mit: Optimize aerodynamic profiles and spacing between components.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex interface requirements.
risk.mit: Implement detailed assembly instructions and training for operators.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient cooling airflow if cooling channel design is compromised.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal analysis and validate cooling channel design before production.

risk.desc: Risk of improper alignment of servo linkage leading to reduced performance.
risk.mit: Ensure precise manufacturing tolerances and perform thorough quality checks.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure at bearing seat under extreme loading conditions.
risk.mit: Perform stress analysis and reinforce bearing seat if necessary.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate service access for maintenance and replacement of components.
risk.mit: Review and improve service access design to ensure easy component replacement.
